title: render_stemma_svg data payload
description: v0.39.0 Newick → SVG stemma renderer. Takes a rooted Newick string (typically from v0.33 build_stemma_with_rooting) and produces a self-contained SVG suitable for direct embedding in HTML/Markdown or saving to disk. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

svg.description: Self-contained SVG markup. Empty string if Newick parse failed.
